ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello [Name],

We hope you are enjoying your experience with [SaaS Product]. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription will renew on [date]. Please review the renewal details below:

Plan: Premium
Term: 12 months
Price: $499.99

If you wish to make changes, log in at <URL> before the renewal date. Otherwise, your account will automatically renew.

Thank you for choosing us.

Best regards,
[Company] Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

This is an automated security alert from Microsoft. Your account password is set to expire in 48 hours. To avoid disruption, you must update your password immediately.

Please click the link below to verify your identity and change your password:

<URL>

Failure to comply will result in account lockout. This action is required by Microsoft security policy.

Thank you,
Microsoft Security Team
